title: RNA sequencing data from a mouse heart transplantation model
author: Gong, Yu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We performed RNA sequencing on grafts after heart transplantation under three conditions: syngeneic, allogeneic, and allogeneic with anti-CD80/86 antibody treatment.
steps_raw: We performed RNA sequencing on grafts after heart transplantation under three conditions: syngeneic, allogeneic, and allogeneic with anti-CD80/86 antibody treatment.
